lead.headline: New York City Faces Its Second Big Storm in Weeks

live.headline: Powerful Storm Hits Northeast With Heavy Snow and High Winds
NJ Transit will suspend service as the storm disrupts the Monday commute.
New York City public schools will have a snow day on Monday.
The storm disrupted travel at major airports in the Northeast.
